landing.heroSubtitle: I invite you to get to know my qualifications.
landing.aboutDescription: An application created to make it easier to present my qualifications to potential employers.
landing.feature1Description: Ability to add, edit and delete information about yourself.
landing.feature3Description: Ability to add and edit information about projects.
landing.feature4Description: Ability to add and edit information about education.
landing.feature5Description: Ability to add and edit information about skills.
landing.feature6Description: Ability to add and edit information about experience.
landing.callToActionDescription: Create an account and start using the application.
